description: MCP server for Dice.com recruitment platform, providing tools for technology job searching, detailed job retrieval, skill-based matching, salary insights, and market trend analysis.

tools.name: search_tech_jobs
tools.description: Search for technology job postings on Dice using keywords, location filters, and remote work preferences.

keywords.description: Job title, role, or technical skills to search for (e.g., 'Python Developer', 'AWS Engineer').

location.description: Geographic location to filter results, such as city, state, or 'Remote'.

remote_only.description: Filter to show only positions that support remote work arrangements.

jobs.description: List of job postings matching the search criteria.

job_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to a job posting on Dice.

title.description: The official job title or position name.

company.description: The name of the employer organization offering the position.

location.description: The geographic location where the job is based.

skills.description: Technical skills and technologies associated with the job posting.

posted_date.description: The date when the job was originally posted, typically in ISO 8601 format.

salary_range.description: String representation of the salary range offered for the position.

is_remote.description: Indicates whether the position supports remote work arrangements.

total_results.description: The total number of job postings matching the search criteria.

tools.name: get_job_details
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive details for a specific tech job posting using its unique identifier.

job_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to a job posting on Dice.
The unique identifier assigned to a job posting on Dice.

title.description: The official job title or position name.

company.description: The name of the employer organization offering the position.

company_size.description: The size category of the employing organization (e.g., '1-50', '1000+').

location.description: The geographic location where the job is based.

description.description: Detailed description of the job responsibilities and role expectations.

requirements.description: Prerequisites and qualifications required for the position.

preferred_skills.description: Technical skills that are preferred but not strictly required for the position.

education.description: Educational qualifications required for the position.

salary_min.description: Minimum salary value for the position.

salary_max.description: Maximum salary value for the position.

benefits.description: List of benefits and perks offered with the position.

posted_date.description: The date when the job was originally posted, typically in ISO 8601 format.

apply_url.description: Direct URL to the application page for the job posting.

tools.name: search_by_skills
tools.description: Find job opportunities matching specific technical skill sets with relevance scoring and demand analytics.

skills.description: Technical skills or technologies to search for in job postings (e.g., 'Python', 'AWS', 'React').

location.description: Geographic location to filter results, such as city, state, or 'Remote'.

jobs.description: List of job postings matching the specified skills.

job_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to a job posting on Dice.

title.description: The official job title or position name.

company.description: The name of the employer organization offering the position.

matching_skills.description: Subset of searched skills that match the job requirements.

match_score.description: A normalized score (0.0-1.0) indicating how well the candidate's skills match the job requirements.

location.description: The geographic location where the job is based.

skill_demand.description: Analytics regarding the demand for the searched skills in the current market.

most_requested_skills.description: List of skills most frequently requested by employers.

salary_by_skill.description: Mapping of skill names to average salary values.

tools.name: get_salary_insights
tools.description: Obtain salary range estimates and compensation factor analysis for tech roles based on market data.

job_title.description: The official job title or position name.

location.description: Geographic location to filter results, such as city, state, or 'Remote'.

years_experience.description: Years of professional experience to factor into salary calculations.

job_title.description: The official job title or position name.

location.description: The geographic location where the job is based.

salary_range_low.description: 25th percentile salary value for the role.

salary_range_mid.description: 50th percentile (median) salary value for the role.

salary_range_high.description: 75th percentile salary value for the role.

currency.description: Currency code for the salary figures (e.g., 'USD').

pay_period.description: Time period for the salary measurement (e.g., 'yearly', 'hourly').

factors.description: Breakdown of salary variations by different influencing factors.

by_experience.description: Salary variations segmented by years of experience.

by_skill.description: Salary premiums associated with specific technical skills.

by_company_size.description: Salary differences based on employer company size.

tools.name: get_tech_trends
tools.description: Analyze current technology job market trends including in-demand skills, job title popularity, and geographic distribution.

time_period.description: The time window used for the trend analysis.

top_job_titles.description: List of job titles currently in highest demand.

title.description: The official job title or position name.

openings_count.description: Number of open positions for this job title.

growth_rate.description: Percentage growth in job postings for this title during the period.

hot_skills.description: Technical skills currently experiencing high demand in the market.

skill.description: Name of the technical skill or technology.

demand_count.description: Number of job postings requesting this skill.

avg_salary.description: Average salary offered for positions requiring this skill.

top_locations.description: Geographic regions with the highest concentration of tech job postings.

location.description: Geographic location with high job volume.

job_count.description: Total number of job postings in this location.
